strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Strong background in cloud platforms, containerization, and testing frameworks (AWS, Docker, Vitest)
concerns: Recent role (re:cinq) is very short (April 2025–Present), raising questions about job stability
Primary stack includes DLang and Ember.js, which are not mentioned in the job requirements
Limited evidence of direct experience with Kotlin/Java (secondary stack requirement) in recent roles
response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack credentials with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, and relevant AI-agent experience. However, his recent short tenure at re:cinq and limited recent exposure to Kotlin/Java raise concerns. His diverse background and open-source contributions mitigate some risks.
